description: YouTube is Google’s online video hosting and streaming platform for watching, uploading, and managing video content and channels. Its developer integrations are documented under Google for Developers rather than on the main consumer web host.
summary: www.youtube.com itself does not expose a documented developer surface on its own host; YouTube’s documented integration surface is the YouTube Data API v3, a REST API authenticated with either a Google API key or Google OAuth 2.0 bearer token, but that API is hosted on `www.googleapis.com`, not `www.youtube.com`.
